source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: Agicap is currently used as the TMS in the France payment environment.
claude_action: Use to anchor Agicap as a live treasury/payment platform rather than a hypothetical future tool.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: Agicap does not have a SOC report available today; a SOC 2 report is described as being on the 2026 roadmap.
claude_action: Use as a major control-design constraint in the target-state finance architecture.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: Agicap does not currently have co-administration; an administrator can create or modify a vendor or profile.
claude_action: Flag as a segregation-of-duties gap requiring either compensating controls or future-state tool redesign.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: The vendor master remains in Sage and not in Agicap, with vendor information flowing through payment files.
claude_action: Use to separate vendor-master ownership from payment execution in the source-of-truth model.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: The payment file sent automatically by accountants is described as non-modifiable in Agicap.
claude_action: Cross-reference this claim with other Agicap evidence that suggests rework risk after cancellation.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: Agicap can support dual validation for some actions when configured, including payments and expense reports.
claude_action: Use as a capability fact, but distinguish it from currently enabled controls.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\Agicap - SOX control - CFGI.msg
fact: The system cannot distinguish USD treasury transfers from supplier third-party transfers, creating a validation-rights risk if the Treasurer can validate USD payments.
claude_action: Escalate as a material future-state design issue for payment-type routing and approver entitlements.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\RE Abivax x CFGI - Retour sur Agicap- SOX.msg
fact: Because Agicap lacks a SOC report, CFGI states Abivax cannot rely on Agicap alone as the signing tool from a SOX perspective and must validate that payments appearing on the bank statement were approved and signed.
claude_action: Map this directly to control remediation and target-state operating-model decisions.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\TMS AGICAP\Point SOX et parametrage moyens de paiement\RE Abivax x CFGI - Retour sur Agicap- SOX.msg
fact: CFGI notes that there appear to be only two payment batches per month, making a bank-statement-to-approval reconciliation process feasible as a formalized compensating control.
claude_action: Use as context for practical design of month-end and payment control evidence.
